reasoning: This substance is the dipotassium salt of zinc(II) complexed with EDTA (ethylenediaminetetraacetic acid), where the EDTA ligand contains amino acid-like carboxymethyl groups coordinated to zinc. It is best classified as an organic metal salt involving amino acid-derived chelating ligands, but the closest available ChemOnt label reflecting the organic acid/amino acid backbone of EDTA is 'Amino acids, peptides, and analogues'.
